# With Heart Marketing

> Heart-centered brand marketing and brand strategy for health and wellness brands, led by Talie Knutson. Rooted in clarity, alignment, consistency, and connection through The With Heart Approach.

With Heart Marketing helps health and wellness founders get clear on who they are at their core and how they communicate, then turn that clarity into aligned messaging and intentional marketing. Founded by Talie Knutson, who brings 15+ years of brand and marketing leadership (Disney, Princess Cruises, MTV, Jada Toys). Based in Santa Clarita, California, serving clients nationwide.

## Core pages
- Home (https://withheart-marketing.com/): Heart-centered brand marketing for health and wellness brands
- Work With Me (https://withheart-marketing.com/work-with-me/): DIY Brand Strategy Workbook, Done-For-You Brand Strategy, Marketing Strategy, Activation, and the Brand Audit
- Brand Marketing (https://withheart-marketing.com/brand-marketing/): Full brand marketing via a curated partner team led by Talie, plus the Brand Marketing Audit

## The With Heart Approach (four phases)
- Root: foundational brand clarity
- Reveal: brand voice, personality, positioning, messaging
- Rise: marketing strategy and direction
- Radiate: activation, leadership, ongoing guidance

## Blog
The With Heart Marketing blog is published at https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/

Cornerstone posts:
- Root: Why Brand Clarity Comes First in Heart-Centered Brand Marketing (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/root-brand-clarity-heart-centered-brand-marketing)
- REVEAL: How Heart-Centered Brand Marketing Creates Consistency and Connection (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/heart-centered-brand-messaging)
- RISE: Building a Heart-Centered Marketing Strategy for Health and Wellness Brands (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/heart-centered-marketing-strategy-health-wellness-brands)
- Radiate: Building Brand Consistency and Connection for Health and Wellness Brands (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/brand-consistency-connection-heart-centered-brand-marketing)
- What Is Heart-Centered Brand Marketing (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/what-is-heart-centered-brand-marketing)
- What Is Heart-Centered Brand Strategy (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/what-is-heart-centered-brand-strategy)
- What Is Brand Clarity? (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/what-is-brand-clarity)
- What Is Brand Marketing (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/what-is-brand-marketing)
- What Is a Brand Strategy and Why Do You Need It? (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/what-is-a-brand-strategy-and-why-do-you-need-it)
- Brand Strategy vs. Marketing Strategy: What's the Difference (and Why You Need Both) (https://blog.withheart-marketing.com/post/brand-strategy-vs-marketing-strategy)

A full machine-readable index of all published posts is at https://withheart-marketing.com/blog-sitemap.xml
